title: Smoked Beef Fillet Quiche
description: A savory and rich quiche filled with smoked beef and perfect for a dinner or brunch option.

ingredients.name: Heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Half-and-half or whole milk works too

instructions: Roll out the quiche crust and place it in a 9-inch tart pan.
In a skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the sliced smoked beef to the skillet and cook until heated through.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, eggs, grated cheese, salt, and pepper.
Pour the cream mixture over the cooked beef mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into the quiche crust.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Let the quiche cool for 10 minutes before serving.
